_comment: content.js and assets/content.css (message_display_scripts) plus icon.png are reachable manifest entry points seeded by the generic manifest walk, so they are NOT flagged. Only the unreachable/ tree has no entry point. The message_display_scripts key (line 7) requires messagesModify always AND scripting before Thunderbird 154; with no strict_min_version declared (oldest), both apply and neither is declared -> two missing-permission findings at line 7.
